questions.question_text:
Select the option which best expresses the same sentences in Passive/Active Voice.
I was making a plan.

options.label: A
options.text: A plan has been made by me.

options.label: B
options.text: A plan was made by me.

options.label: C
options.text: A plan is being made by me.

options.label: D
options.text: A plan was being made by me.

questions.correct_answer: A plan was being made by me.
questions.explanation_text: A plan was being made by me.

questions.question_text: She writes a letter. (passive voice)

options.label: A
options.text: A letter has been written by her.

options.label: B
options.text: A letter had been written by her.

options.label: C
options.text: A letter was written by her.

options.label: D
options.text: A letter is written by her.

questions.correct_answer: A letter is written by her.
questions.explanation_text:
A letter is written by her.
Rule: In Passive Voice, the Object of the Active Verb becomes the Subject of the passive verb.

questions.question_text: The hunter ran after the lion. Choose the doer in this passive voice:

options.label: A
options.text: Hunter

options.label: B
options.text: Lion

options.label: C
options.text: Ran

options.label: D
options.text: After

questions.explanation_text: Hunter is doing action on a lion so he is the doer.

questions.question_text:
Select the option which best expresses the same sentences in Passive/Active Voice.
They will arrange a variety programme.

options.label: A
options.text: A variety programme will be arranged by them.

options.label: B
options.text: A variety programme has been arranged by them.

options.label: C
options.text: A variety programme was be arranged by them.

options.label: D
options.text: A variety programme shall be arranged by them.

questions.correct_answer: A variety programme will be arranged by them.
questions.explanation_text: A variety programme will be arranged by them.

questions.question_text: Karthik has built a house. The passive voice of this sentence is:

options.label: A
options.text: Karthik is building a house.

options.label: B
options.text: A house has been built by Karthik.

options.label: C
options.text: The house is been built by Karthik.

options.label: D
options.text: Karthik was building a house.

questions.correct_answer: A house has been built by Karthik.
questions.explanation_text:
A house has been built by Karthik.
In passive voice object (a house) of the active voice becomes subject and verb (has been + V3) changes in agreement with a new subject.

questions.question_text: Mr. Sharma bought a new bungalow. Choose the doer in this active:

options.label: A
options.text: Bungalow

options.label: B
options.text: New

options.label: C
options.text: Mr. Sharma

options.label: D
options.text: Bought

questions.explanation_text: Mr. Sharma is the doer because in active voice subject is the doer.

questions.question_text: The water fills the tub. The passive voice of this sentence is:

options.label: A
options.text: Water is filling the tub.

options.label: B
options.text: Filled by water is the tub.

options.label: C
options.text: The tub is filled with water.

options.label: D
options.text: In the tub water is filled.

questions.correct_answer: The tub is filled with water.
questions.explanation_text: In passive voice object of the active voice becomes the subject and verb changes in agreement with the new subject.

questions.question_text:
Select the option which best expresses the same sentences in Passive/Active Voice.
The boy is flying a kite.

options.label: A
options.text: A kite was being flying by the boy.

options.label: B
options.text: A kite is being flying by the boy.

options.label: C
options.text: A kite is being flown by the boy.

options.label: D
options.text: A kite was being flown by the boy.

questions.correct_answer: A kite is being flown by the boy.
questions.explanation_text: A kite is being flown by the boy.

questions.question_text: Ruchi waters the plants. (passive voice)

options.label: A
options.text: The plants were watered by Ruchi

options.label: B
options.text: Watered by Ruchi are the plants

options.label: C
options.text: The plants are watered by Ruchi

options.label: D
options.text: Are plants watered by Ruchi

questions.correct_answer: The plants are watered by Ruchi
questions.explanation_text: In passive voice object of the active voice becomes subject and verb changes in agreement with the new subject.

questions.question_text: The poor were laughed at by him. (active voice)

options.label: A
options.text: He had laughed at the poor.

options.label: B
options.text: Was the pòor laughed at by him?

options.label: C
options.text: He laughed at the poor.

options.label: D
options.text: He was laughing at the poor.

questions.explanation_text: In active voice, the subject is the doer of the action.

questions.question_text:
Select the option which best expresses the same sentences in Passive/Active Voice.
Siva guides me.

options.label: A
options.text: I am guided by Siva.

options.label: B
options.text: I have been guided by Siva.

options.label: C
options.text: I am being guided by Siva.

options.label: D
options.text: I was guided by Siva.

questions.question_text: Your mom will forgive you. (passive voice)

options.label: A
options.text: You will be forgiven by your mom.

options.label: B
options.text: You will be forgave by your mom.

options.label: C
options.text: Mom will be forgiving you.

options.label: D
options.text: You shall be forgiven by mom.

questions.correct_answer: You will be forgiven by your mom.
questions.explanation_text:
You will be forgiven by your mom.
Rule: In Passive Voice, the Object of the Active Verb becomes the Subject of the passive verb.

questions.question_text: My friends enjoyed the party. (passive voice)

options.label: A
options.text: The party was enjoyed by them.

options.label: B
options.text: The party was enjoyed by my friends.

options.label: C
options.text: The party is enjoyed by my friends.

options.label: D
options.text: The party has been enjoyed by my friends.

questions.correct_answer: The party was enjoyed by my friends.
questions.explanation_text:
The party was enjoyed by my friends.
Rule: In Passive Voice, the Object of the Active Verb becomes the Subject of the passive verb.

questions.question_text: Who can answer my question? (passive voice)

options.label: A
options.text: By whom can my question be answered?

options.label: B
options.text: By whom my question can be answered?

options.label: C
options.text: My question can be answer by whom?

options.label: D
options.text: By whom will my question be answered?

questions.correct_answer: By whom my question can be answered?
questions.explanation_text:
By whom my question can be answered?
Rule: In Passive Voice, the Object of the Active Verb becomes the Subject of the passive verb.

questions.question_text:
Rewrite the active sentence to passive:
The girls can play volley-ball.

Rewrite the passive sentence to active:
A watch was given to him by us.

Rewrite the passive sentence to active:
Tia will never be helped by Ria.

Rewrite the active sentence to passive:
My friend bought a new car.

Rewrite the following by changing the active to passive and passive to active:
They understand Telugu.

Rewrite the active sentence to passive:
Ravi cleaned the bathroom.

Rewrite the active sentence to passive:
Ramesh takes photos.

Rewrite the passive sentence to active:
The telephone was invented by Alexander Graham Bell.

Rewrite the passive sentence to active:
Coffee is sold by the shopkeeper.

Rewrite the passive sentence to active:
The exercise was completed by the teacher.

Select sentences in passive voice from the given options.
The broken pieces of the glass are being swept by the maid.
Most of the crimes this year have been solved by the police.
No one responded to the call to donate the blood.
The salesman is driving the car out of the garage.

options.label: A
options.text: (A) and (B) are passive voice

options.label: B
options.text: (A) and (C) are passive voice

options.label: C
options.text: (A), (B) and (C) are passive voice

options.label: D
options.text: (B) and (D) are passive voice

questions.explanation_text: In sentences (A) and (B) action is being done on the subject so it is in passive form.
